title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 231.150 - Road laws — how applied
text:
231.150.  Road laws — how applied. — All road laws of this state shall apply to counties under township organization, unless by their terms limited to counties not under township organization, or in conflict with the provisions of this law.
(RSMo 1939 § 8813) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8149; 1919 § 10911 
Township special road and bridge tax, levy, collection and disbursement, 137.585 to 137.595 
(1966) A township has the authority to own equipment and employ workmen and to use them in maintaining and improving the roads of the township. Sherman Township, Cass County v. Farr (Mo.), 406 S.W.2d 630.
